title: Promo Codes
description: Create promo codes for your sessions and share them with your patients.

note.title: Practitioner promo rules
note.body: Promo-code discounts cannot exceed 20%. The discount cost is split equally between the platform and the practitioner.
note.split: The backend calculates the discount split. The patient sees only the final payable amount, and the discount is recorded in payment snapshots and settlement logic.
note.sessionOnly: Promo codes apply to your own session payments only. They do not apply to other practitioners or to package purchases.

table.windowHint: Start and end dates if set

empty.title: You have not created any promo codes yet.
empty.description: Create a code for your own sessions, share it with patients, and track how often it is redeemed.

error.title: Could not load promo codes
error.note: Please try again in a moment.

form.createDescription: Set up a session-only promo code for your patients.
form.editDescription: Update safe fields for this promo code.
form.codeHint: Use letters and numbers only. You may also use - or _. The value is normalized to uppercase.
form.codeReadOnlyHint: The code is immutable after creation.
form.discountHint: Maximum discount is 20%. Percentage-only for practitioner promo codes.
form.discountLockedHint: This coupon already has redemptions, so the discount value is locked.
form.maxDiscountAmountHint: Optional cap on the discount amount if you want one.
form.usageLimitPerPatientHint: Leave empty if a patient may use it more than once.
form.startsAtHint: Optional start time for when the promo code becomes active.
form.endsAtHint: Optional end time for when the promo code expires.
form.isActiveHint: Inactive codes remain visible but cannot be used at checkout.

validation.codeInvalid: Use only letters, numbers, dash, and underscore.
validation.usageBelowCurrent: Usage limit cannot be lower than current redemptions.
validation.dateInvalid: Enter a valid date and time.
validation.dateRangeInvalid: End date must be after the start date.
validation.discountLockedAfterRedemption: Discount value cannot be changed after redemptions exist.

detail.title: Promo code details
detail.description: Review usage, limits, and redemption history for this code.

stats.discountHint: The patient pays the discounted amount only
stats.splitHint: Platform and practitioner share the discount equally

detail.ruleNote: This promo code applies only to your own sessions. It cannot be used on another practitioner, and package purchases are not part of the V1 scope.
detail.redemptionsNote: Redemption history is shown newest first. Patient contact details are intentionally hidden.
detail.deniedTitle: You cannot view this promo code
detail.deniedNote: You do not have access to this promo code.
detail.notFoundNote: This promo code does not exist or is no longer available.
detail.errorTitle: Could not load promo code details
detail.errorNote: Please try again in a moment.

redemptions.title: Redemption history
redemptions.emptyTitle: This promo code has not been used yet.
redemptions.emptyNote: Redemption rows will appear here after a successful payment uses this code.
redemptions.deniedNote: You do not have access to this redemption history.
redemptions.notFoundNote: This promo code does not have redemption history yet.
redemptions.errorNote: Please try again in a moment.

disableModal.title: Disable promo code
disableModal.description: This will stop patients from using the promo code in future checkout sessions.
disableModal.body: Are you sure you want to disable this code? It will remain visible in your list, but it can no longer be applied at checkout.
